info.title: GoCardless API
info.description: GoCardless API for collecting recurring payments via Direct Debit.

get.summary: Get a single customer bank account

parameters.name: payout
parameters.description: ID of the payout to list items for

session_token.description: The session token used when creating the redirect flow

get.summary: Get a single creditor bank account

post.summary: Choose currency for a billing request
Confirm payer details for a billing request

bearerAuth.description: Access token passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

After.name: after
After.description: Cursor for pagination (ID of the object after which results start)

Before.name: before
Before.description: Cursor for pagination (ID of the object before which results end)

amount.description: Amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. pence for GBP)
Amount in the smallest currency unit

total_amount_confirmation.description: Total expected refunded amount in the smallest currency unit

BadRequest.description: Bad request - validation error or invalid parameters

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing bearer token
